title: Vetra remote drives enable collaborative development by syncing document models across team members via ph init/checkout/vetra commands
content: Vetra remote drives enable team collaboration: `ph init --remote-drive <url>` creates a new project connected to a remote Vetra drive, adding `vetra.driveId` and `vetra.driveUrl` to `powerhouse.config.json`. `ph checkout --remote-drive <url>` clones an existing project by querying the remote drive for its configured GitHub URL. `ph vetra` starts Switchboard connected to the remote drive with auto-sync and Connect Studio. The `--watch` flag creates a second 'Vetra Preview' drive for testing local changes while the main drive stays stable. The preview drive dynamically loads local document models and editors. Key distinction: without remote drive, `ph vetra` creates a local drive only; with remote drive, it syncs across team members.
description: ph init --remote-drive creates projects connected to shared drives; ph checkout clones existing projects; ph vetra starts dev environment.
